field_notes.entity_id: Primitive entity id fixture; does not prove entity existence.
field_notes.attributes: Empty attribute list fixture only. Official codec writes zero list length and avoids attribute registry holder and modifier payloads.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound update_attributes packet framing and dispatch/decode for one entity id plus empty attribute list only; do not infer entity existence, attribute registry holders, modifiers, initialized attributes, or client-load completion.
